urdu transliteration text:
Ay Meri Bibi Tere Dar Pe Istighasa He,
Tera Mamnoon Meri Shehzadi Ye Jahan Sara Hai
english translation text: O My Lady!  We lay our entreaties at your doorstep, My Princess, ever grateful is this whole world to you

urdu transliteration text: Tu Hame Hifz Or Amaan Dede, Apni Chadar Ke Saiban Dede, Teri Kudrat Me Kya Nahi Bibi, Tu Jise Chahe Do Jahaan Dede
english translation text: Grant us peace and protection;  Preserve us under your veil's protection, What can lie beyond your powers, Lady?  Both Worlds you can give to whoever you please

urdu transliteration text: Ay Meri Bibi Aansu-o Mein Duwa Mangi HaiTeri Tasbee Hi Parke Dil Ne Tuje Pukaara Hai.
english translation text:
O My Lady! I have supplicated through my tears
Having recited your Tasbeeh, has my heart called upon you

urdu transliteration text: Farshe Majlis Pe Aur Musalle Par, Har Jawaa Keh Raha Hai Roro Kar, Ham Rahe Na Rahe Magar Bibi, Ta Qayamat Rahe Game Sarwar
english translation text:
Upon the majlis rug and upon the prayer mat; every crying youth declares
My Lady, it matters not whether we live or die; May the grief of Sarwar till Judgement survive

urdu transliteration text: Ay Meri Bibi Tere Bacho Ka Gham Manaa Te HaiApni Awlaad Se Kahi Barke Gham Ye Pyara Hai
english translation text:
O My Lady, we commemorate the sorrow of your children
This sorrow, to us, is more precious than our own children
